items.title: First deal strikes Samsung’s 2026 Odyssey G7 32-inch 4K dual-mode gaming monitor at $300 off
items.summary: Over at Samsung, you’ll find the latest Odyssey G7 (G73SH) 4K 165Hz gaming monitor listed for $849.99 shipped. This particular listing also includes a $50 upgrade credit that auto-applies during checkout, essentially dropping the monitor down to $799.99 shipped from its usual price of $1,100. This is the first deal we’re tracking for this model, and it takes $300 off its price tag to mark a new best price to beat. Amazon currently has the same model listed for $850, meaning you’re missing out on the $50 upgrade credit for additional savings. This is one of the first dual-mode gaming monitors from Samsung that can switch between 4K and FHD resolutions, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
items.summary: After a lengthy legal dispute, Krafton has settled with its subsidiary Unknown Worlds Entertainment, which is developing Subnautica 2, and will pay bonuses to the studio's staff, Bloomberg reports. The dispute began last year after Krafton pushed out Unknown Worlds' co-founders, Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, and its CEO, Ted Gill, ahead of a potential […]

items.title: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
items.summary: Microsoft will likely soon follow Sony and stop the production of physical discs for Xbox games. But instead of leaving physical discs behind entirely, sources familiar with Microsoft's plans tell me the company has quietly been working on a disc-to-digital feature that will allow Xbox owners to digitize their existing physical game collections. Xbox employees […]

items.title: Jackery’s 256Wh/80,000mAh Explorer 240D compact power station is down at its second-lowest $129 price

Despite it carrying that $209 MSRP, we’ve seen it climb as high as $235 on Amazon in 2026, with discounts having previously gone as low as $129, until Prime Day gave us a newer $119 low. Learn more below, or you can also shop from the brand’s Independence Day Sale lineup here.
